description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a robust wooden frame and dark gray fabric upholstery. The seat features a single, thick, tufted cushion that spans the entire width, providing a plush and inviting appearance. Five loose, overstuffed back cushions in matching dark gray fabric are arranged along the backrest, offering ample support and comfort. The armrests are straight, flat, and constructed from the same wood as the frame, extending slightly above the seat level and running parallel to the seat. The sofa stands on four black metal sled-style legs, giving it a contemporary and slightly industrial look. The overall design is minimalist yet comfortable, suitable for urban parks, public plazas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern sofa with a wooden frame, dark gray tufted seat, five loose back cushions, and black metal sled legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, tufted seat cushion, five loose back cushions, and straight wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat cushion, the height of the armrest, and the layered arrangement of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wooden back panel and the tops of the back cushions peeking above the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the sofa's depth, armrest profile, and cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five loose, overstuffed back cushions in dark gray fabric are arranged along the backrest, with a single, wide, tufted seat cushion spanning the entire seating area.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, flat wooden armrests extend slightly above the seat, running parallel to the seat with a minimalist, unpadded design and a natural wood finish.
attribute_leg_design: Four black metal sled-style legs, positioned at the corners, provide sturdy support and a contemporary look; the legs are exposed and have a rectangular profile.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight backrest formed by the wooden frame, topped with five loose, plush back cushions for added comfort and support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a tufted texture on the seat cushion and smooth, unpatterned surfaces on the back cushions.
